batzzzzz:
reblog_comment:
I do miss some of the unique things from the old Usenet days:

*Ascii Art - Requires that “fixed bitch font,” lol
*In Line Replies
*Wackylacing (Which requires in line replies to work properly)

And for those that don’t know about “Eternal September.” Every September, when the new college semester would begin, all these new folks would gain Internet access and thus access to Usenet and every September would be flooded with new users who had not yet learned the Netiquette of the era. Only, things didn’t go back to normal after September 1993, when a bunch of ISPs added Usenet access and especially AOL in early 94.

God, I’m an old lady, lol.


Alexandria
…who often ended her posts like this, as was the style at the time.
